category_title: Approval-seeking students who struggle with persistence
scenario_title: Math operations on Nintendo DS with environmental distractions
minimal_context: The student is playing the x20 game on a Nintendo DS in the Education Support Centre classroom to practice math operations.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start the x20 game on the Nintendo DS and try the next multiplication problem.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Uses his fingers to count) I am trying to do the multiplication. Did I do this part right? (Makes eye contact with the teacher)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: These large numbers are really difficult, but I will keep trying to figure it out with my number line.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stops looking at the Nintendo DS and turns around to watch the other people in the room, picking up an object from the desk instead of finishing the math problem)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start the x20 game on the Nintendo DS and try the next multiplication problem.

STUDENT: (Uses his fingers to count) I am trying to do the multiplication. Did I do this part right? (Makes eye contact with the teacher)

TUTOR: Just keep working on it.

STUDENT: These large numbers are really difficult, but I will keep trying to figure it out with my number line.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: (Stops looking at the Nintendo DS and turns around to watch the other people in the room, picking up an object from the desk instead of finishing the math problem)

task.content: Attempting various math operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication) and large numbers in the x20 game on the Nintendo DS
task.learning_goal: solving single digit addition, subtraction and multiplication problems

context.environment: Education Support Centre classroom with people and objects around him
context.materials: Nintendo DS, counters, number lines, and his fingers
context.social_setting: Interacting with the teacher while performing tasks
context.time_context: Middle to final stages of the intervention

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When people and objects around him occasionally distracted him
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: He was still distracted occasionally and required verbal prompting or redirecting

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: He sought approval and would make eye contact with his teacher
he returned to work and persisted with the tasks even when he found them difficult
